description: Introduction to the Solana Attestation Service, a protocol for linking off-chain data with on-chain wallets, enhancing KYC processes and tokenized attestations. Live demo featuring Chuck and Rohan showcasing its capabilities.
topic_summary: Overview of the Solana Attestation Service and its applications in KYC and data management, including a live demonstration of its integration with Roam and Polyflow [t=59:01].
